texto: I like it best when two ideas collide, like when you have a crazed attitude towards women combined with a crazed attitude towards the Vietnamese. I like that. Even if it's not true, I don't care whether it's true or false. I just do it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Peter Saul: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I like it best when two ideas collide, like when you have a crazed attitude towards women combine…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, women, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e inspiracional.
